title: exacum pallidum
intro: Exacum pallidum, a type of flowering plant native to Sri Lanka, is a member of the gentian family and is also known as the 'white exacum' or 'white gentian'. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Exacum pallidum has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and acting as an antispasmodic. The plant is often prepared as a tea or used in herbal remedies, with the leaves and flowers being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
